title: 2026 Oscar Best Picture Predictions
text: Based on the Gold Derby article, the expert predictions for the Best Picture race are: One Battle After Another at 76.87% odds directed by Paul Thomas Anderson, distributed by Warner Bros, with cast including Leonardo DiCaprio, Sean Penn, and Benicio Del Toro. The film centers on ex-revolutionaries reuniting to rescue the daughter of one of their own. Sinners at 18.81% odds directed by Ryan Coogler, distributed by Warner Bros, starring Michael B. Jordan and Hailee Steinfeld. The plot follows twin brothers returning to their hometown to start again, only to discover that an even greater evil is waiting. Hamnet at 1.37% odds directed by Chloé Zhao, distributed by Focus Features, featuring Jessie Buckley and Paul Mescal, exploring how Agnes and William Shakespeare grapple with grief in 16th-century England. The article notes that the 98th Academy Awards will air on March 15, 2026. The predictions derive from combined forecasts of experts polled from major media outlets and thousands of user predictions on Gold Derby's platform.
